subcodes.title: Words to a Frenchman, spoken on 1914-06-03
subcodes.first_line: Does this philosopher mean that there is no 'motion' whatever in Nature? For as we know there are several kinds of motion
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @heat and motion, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @law of transformation and change
